narrative:
North Canton 2-C (precinct in Stark County) has 826 registered voters, with 53.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.5%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.1 percentage points.
